# Backyard Bobby's

> Licensed Maryland outdoor construction contractor serving Anne Arundel County. MHIC #05-163777.

Backyard Bobby's is an outdoor construction company based in Millersville, Maryland, owned and operated by Bobby. We serve 19 communities across Anne Arundel County with a full range of residential outdoor improvement services.

## Services

- Stamped Concrete: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/stamped-concrete
- Hardscaping: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/hardscaping
- Decks: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/decks
- Driveway Installation: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/driveway-installation
- Fencing: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/fencing
- Gravel Pads & Concrete Foundations: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/gravel-pads-and-concrete-foundations
- Roofing: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/roofing
- Excavation & Demolition: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/excavation-and-demolition
- Accessory Dwelling Units: https://backyardbobbys.com/services/accessory-dwelling-units

## Service Areas

Annapolis, Arnold, Pasadena, Severna Park, Crofton, Millersville, Severn, Odenton, Edgewater, Gambrills, Crownsville, Shady Side, Linthicum Heights, Riviera Beach, Riva, Herald Harbor, Parole, Glen Burnie, Hanover
